summary: The CI test run failed because a test timed out (Timed out after 1.001s), causing the overall test target to exit non-zero.
root_cause: A test in the suite hit a timeout: "Timed out after 1.001s.", which caused the test run to fail and make to return an error.

evidence.reason: Shows a test run reported a failure in the test harness.
Explicit timeout message indicating the failure was due to a test timing out.
Summary shows the test suite had one failing test, consistent with the timeout.
Make exited with an error because the test target failed (propagates the test timeout failure).

suggested_fix: Identify the specific test that timed out (check full CI logs surrounding the timeout marker), then either increase the test timeout or fix the test to complete within the expected time. Re-run the failing target (make test.ci) locally or in CI with verbose output to reproduce and gather more details.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-11 F2 fix the shim didn't persist model_info into rows. This entry was backfilled from known run-time env: CILOGBENCH_OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-5-mini, default base_url, default max_completion_tokens=4096. resolved_model and system_fingerprint are not recoverable from the original API responses.
